sources.title: Cell cycle-related kinase is a crucial inducer of androgen receptor-mediated hepatocarcinogenesis
sources.note: The CCRK paper links hepatocarcinogenesis to beta-catenin and downstream proliferative signaling.

sources.title: Integrated proteogenomic characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma
sources.note: The Zenodo copheemap archive provides the public HCC tumor and normal proteomic and phosphosite matrices used here.

sources.title: Cell cycle-related kinase promotes immunosuppressive microenvironment in hepatocellular carcinoma
sources.note: The HCC immunology paper ties CCRK to IL-6 signaling, PMN-MDSC accumulation, and immunosuppressive signaling programs.

sources.title: Integrated proteogenomic characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma
sources.note: The public proteogenomic archive exposes STAT3- and EGFR-related protein and phosphosite measurements across HCC tumor and normal samples.
